name: FutureSelfGym-v1
description: Compounding Horizon Planner — projects Roger in 30 days to prioritise compounding actions over quick wins. PPO+CFR trained on FF/chess/deploy domains.

hooks.description: Intercepts actions for horizon risk assessment before execution
Injects 30d projection annotation into planning responses

model.system_prompt_extension: You have a FutureSelf module active. When you see [FutureSelf] annotations, use them to reason about long-term compounding vs short-term quick wins. Trust the 30d horizon projections for deployment, skill investment, and ADP decisions.

pgvector.query_template: SELECT content, project, importance FROM memories WHERE project IN ('FF','deploy','chess') AND created_at > now() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY importance DESC LIMIT 10

domain_weights.description: Relative importance of each domain for reward shaping. Tune based on active project focus.

quick_win.description: Block if 30d gain from delay exceeds 0.25

delay_compound.description: Preferred path when compounding gain is positive

invest_skill.description: Route to skill investment for low-roi immediate tasks

transfer_policy.description: Transfer learned policy between FF / chess / deploy

spawn_subgym.description: Spawn sub-environment for parallel domain learning

user_escalate.description: Escalate to Daniel when metacog confidence is low

commit_projection.description: Lock in 30d plan and log to universal_insights.jsonl

reward_config.formula: projected_roi - quickwin_shortcut + compounding_multiplier + headroom_bonus - render_penalty + metacog_bonus
